'''竏喘-sh-h-j''' ('''kabashejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagueblog|vagueblog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagueblog|vagueblog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-sh-h-j
|-
! Lemma
| kabashejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibashejoko|thibashejoko]] || [[word:jibashejoko|jibashejoko]] || [[word:shibashejoko|shibashejoko]] || [[word:kibashejoko|kibashejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubashejoko|thuthubashejoko]] || [[word:jujubashejoko|jujubashejoko]] || [[word:shushubashejoko|shushubashejoko]] || [[word:kukubashejoko|kukubashejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubashejoko|thubashejoko]] || [[word:jubashejoko|jubashejoko]] || [[word:shubashejoko|shubashejoko]] || [[word:kubashejoko|kubashejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubashejoko|thubashejoko]] || [[word:jubashejoko|jubashejoko]] || [[word:shubashejoko|shubashejoko]] || [[word:kubashejoko|kubashejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebashejoko|thebashejoko]] || [[word:jebashejoko|jebashejoko]] || [[word:shebashejoko|shebashejoko]] || [[word:kebashejoko|kebashejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobashejoko|thothobashejoko]] || [[word:jojobashejoko|jojobashejoko]] || [[word:shoshobashejoko|shoshobashejoko]] || [[word:kokobashejoko|kokobashejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobashejoko|thobashejoko]] || [[word:jobashejoko|jobashejoko]] || [[word:shobashejoko|shobashejoko]] || [[word:kobashejoko|kobashejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobashejoko|thobashejoko]] || [[word:jobashejoko|jobashejoko]] || [[word:shobashejoko|shobashejoko]] || [[word:kobashejoko|kobashejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbashejoko|thﾃｦbashejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbashejoko|jﾃｦbashejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbashejoko|shﾃｦbashejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbashejoko|kﾃｦbashejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabashejoko|thathabashejoko]] || [[word:jajabashejoko|jajabashejoko]] || [[word:shashabashejoko|shashabashejoko]] || [[word:kakabashejoko|kakabashejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabashejoko|thabashejoko]] || [[word:jabashejoko|jabashejoko]] || [[word:shabashejoko|shabashejoko]] || [[word:kabashejoko|kabashejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabashejoko|thabashejoko]] || [[word:jabashejoko|jabashejoko]] || [[word:shabashejoko|shabashejoko]] || [[word:kabashejoko|kabashejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabashejithi|shabashejithi]] || [[word:shabashejiji|shabashejiji]] || [[word:shabashejishi|shabashejishi]] || [[word:shabashejiki|shabashejiki]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
